Everything You Need
One platform.
Infinite possibilities.
JACE combines the best of social media with a full-featured marketplace — no switching apps, no friction.

For You Feed

A personalized, scrollable video feed powered by what you love. Discover creators, trends, and products tailored to your taste.

Built-In Store

List products, manage inventory, and sell directly to your audience. From handmade goods to digital products — your store, your rules.

DMs & Community

Chat with followers, share videos in DMs, send offers on products, and build real relationships with your community.

Creator Analytics

Track revenue, views, followers, and top-selling products with a full analytics dashboard built for creators who mean business.

Explore & Discover

Browse trending videos, search creators, and discover what's hot. The explore page surfaces the best content so you never miss a beat.

Secure Checkout

PayPal-powered payments, order tracking, and shipping labels — a complete, secure commerce experience from cart to doorstep.

The Feed
Scroll into your
next obsession

Short-form video, fine-tuned for you. Like, comment, share, repost — or tap a tagged product to buy it on the spot. Content and commerce, perfectly intertwined.

The Store
Your shop.
Your audience.
Zero middlemen.

List a product in minutes. Set your price, upload photos, and start selling to the people who already follow you. No external links, no commission maze — just you and your buyers.

How It Works
Up and running
in three steps

Whether you're here to watch or to sell, getting started is effortless.

01

Create Your Account

Sign up in seconds with email. Customize your profile, pick a username, and you're in.

02

Share or Shop

Upload short-form videos, list products in the store, or just explore the feed and discover what's trending.

03

Grow & Earn

Build your following, sell products to your audience, track everything with real analytics, and cash out securely via PayPal.

Built for Creators
The tools to turn
your passion into profit

JACE gives you everything — content creation, community building, and a real storefront — without needing five different apps.

Orders & Shipping

Returns & Refunds

Account & Security

Community Guidelines

Frequently Asked Questions

Go to your Inbox > Your Orders. Click "Details" on any active order to see the current shipping status and tracking number if available.
You can cancel an order as long as the status is "Paid" and has not yet been "Shipped" by the seller.
Funds are held in "Pending" status until you generate a shipping label. Once the label is created, the order is automatically marked shipped and funds move to your wallet.

Still need help?

Fill out the form below and our support team will get back to you within 24 hours.

Community Guidelines

JACE is a space for creativity, connection, and commerce. To keep the platform safe and trustworthy, all users must follow these guidelines.

1 Respect Others

  • Treat everyone with respect.
  • No harassment, bullying, or intimidation.
  • No hate speech or discrimination based on identity (race, gender, religion, sexuality, etc.).
  • No threats, including indirect or implied threats.
  • Repeated unwanted contact (messages, comments, offers) is considered harassment.
  • Disagreement is allowed. Abuse is not.

2 No Harmful Content

  • Do not post or promote content that could harm others.
  • No violence, threats, or encouragement of harm.
  • No content promoting self-harm or exploitation.
  • No dangerous challenges or reckless behavior intended to injure.
  • No instructions for illegal or harmful activities.

3 Be Authentic

  • Be honest about who you are and what you post.
  • No impersonation of other users, creators, or staff.
  • No fake accounts used to mislead or manipulate.
  • No deceptive or heavily misleading content.
  • Sponsored or promotional content should be clearly disclosed.

4 Marketplace Integrity

  • Buying and selling on JACE must be fair and honest.
  • Only sell items you own or are authorized to sell.
  • Accurately describe items (condition, authenticity, pricing, defects).
  • No counterfeit, replica, or stolen goods.
  • No bait-and-switch listings or misleading photos.
  • Honor accepted offers and completed transactions.
  • Listings or behavior intended to deceive buyers or sellers will result in removal or bans.

5 No Scams or Fraud

  • Any attempt to exploit users is strictly prohibited.
  • Fake listings or non-delivery of items.
  • Phishing or attempts to collect sensitive information.
  • Asking users to complete payments outside the platform.
  • Chargeback abuse or payment manipulation.
  • Fake giveaways or misleading promotions.
  • If it’s intended to trick, exploit, or steal—it’s not allowed.

6 Safe Transactions

  • Help keep the marketplace secure.
  • Keep transactions within the platform whenever possible.
  • Do not pressure others into off-platform deals.
  • Follow through on shipping, payment, and communication.
  • Respect agreed timelines and terms.
  • Failure to complete transactions in good faith may result in account action.

7 Respect Privacy

  • Protect your own and others’ personal information.
  • Do not share private or sensitive information (addresses, phone numbers, etc.).
  • No doxxing, stalking, or tracking users.
  • Do not use information obtained on JACE for harassment or exploitation.

8 No Spam

  • Keep interactions genuine.
  • No spam, repetitive, or irrelevant content.
  • No fake engagement (likes, followers, comments, or offers).
  • No mass messaging or unsolicited promotions.
  • Do not manipulate platform systems (feeds, offers, reports).

9 Content Standards

  • Keep content appropriate for a broad audience.
  • No explicit sexual content or pornography.
  • No graphic or disturbing imagery.
  • Limited suggestive content may be removed at our discretion.
  • Avoid excessive gore, shock content, or disturbing themes.
  • We may remove content that crosses the line, even if it’s not explicitly listed.

10 Use Features Responsibly

  • All platform tools should be used in good faith.
  • Reporting is for real violations only (false reporting may lead to penalties).
  • Messaging, comments, and offers must be respectful and relevant.
  • Do not exploit bugs, glitches, or system vulnerabilities.

Enforcement & Consequences

We take violations seriously. Depending on severity, actions may include content removal, warnings, feature restrictions, temporary suspension, or permanent account bans.

By using the platform, you agree to follow these guidelines.

Change Username

Enable 2-Step Verification

Orders & Shipping

Returns & Refunds

Account & Security

Community Guidelines

Frequently Asked Questions

Go to your Inbox > Your Orders. Click "Details" on any active order to see the current shipping status and tracking number if available.
You can cancel an order as long as the status is "Paid" and has not yet been "Shipped" by the seller. Go to Order Details to find the Cancel button.
Funds are held in "Pending" status until you generate a shipping label. Once the label is created, the order is automatically marked shipped and funds move to your wallet, where they can be withdrawn to your linked bank account or PayPal.

Still need help?

Fill out the form below and our support team will get back to you within 24 hours.
